programme.title: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: (M) A student is found dead in a tunnel linked to the Manson murders. As occult rumors spread, another missing friend redirects police suspicion back toward the victim's inner circle.

programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Death By Fame
programme.desc: (M) Runway model turned mom-a-ger Samira Frasch turns up dead at the bottom of her pool. Police uncover a marriage filled with infidelities, accusations and deep motives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.
